title: Village Manager Jack Knight's Sent Emails 5/3 to 5/9/2026

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Village Manager Jack Knight's Sent Emails 5/3 to 5/9/2026
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting copies of the following public records:

All emails sent by Village Manager Jack Knight (including primary and any secondary official village email accounts) for the period beginning Sunday, May 3, 2026, through Saturday, May 9, 2026.

This request includes all sent items, including any attachments or metadata associated with these communications.

If any portion of this request is denied, please provide a detailed written explanation for the denial, citing the specific statutory exemption(s) relied upon, and provide the name and title of the person responsible for the denial as required by 5 ILCS 140/9.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Concerned Citizen of La Grange
